splash.title: Make a cookbook someone will keep forever
splash.body: Turn family recipes, favourite dinners, and kitchen memories into a beautiful book — made by you.

import.title: Bring your recipes in
import.body: Paste a link, snap a photo, upload a file, or type your own.

sketch.title: Beautiful with one tap
sketch.body: Hit "Make me Sketch" and your plain recipe becomes a scrapbook page.

dedication.title: Add the note they'll read first
dedication.body: Write a dedication, drop in a photo, and make it personal — in your own handwriting.

book.title: A real book, in their hands
book.body: Choose hardcover or softcover, type their address, and we'll do the rest.

cook.stop_body: You're partway through. Your place won't be saved.

stash.title: Your stash
stash.subtitle: Stickers, photos, and the things you come back to.
stash.favorites_empty: Heart a sticker in the editor to save it here.
stash.photos_empty: Photos you upload to a recipe land here. Coming with the next update.
